patches.description: Auto-claim rewarded ad rewards without watching ads. Supports MAX Unity, native MAX, Unity Ads, LevelPlay. WARNING: Enabling No Ads alongside this patch will prevent rewards from being claimed.
patches.name: Ads Free Rewards

patches.description: Blocks all non-rewarded ads: interstitial, banner, app open, MREC. Supports MAX Unity and native MAX. WARNING: Enabling Ads Free Rewards alongside this patch will cause it to NOT work (No Ads takes priority).
patches.name: No Ads

patches.description: Makes the app think it was installed from Google Play Store. Supports Pairip and generic installer check methods. Recommended if the app has a Play Store license check.
patches.name: Spoof Play Store Install Source
